caption:
Most owners judge their speed to lead by their best save. The one time they called back in ninety seconds.

A 2026 benchmark of 253,817 inbound B2B leads found the median company takes 42 hours to send a first reply, and 35% take longer than a full day.

The conversion curve shows why that matters. Leads answered inside 5 minutes convert at 21%. Leads answered after 24+ hours convert at 2.3%, a 900% difference on the same leads.

Run your own audit this week: pull your last 20 leads, log the time between lead-in and first reply for each one, then find the middle number, not your fastest one. That median is what your leads actually experience, not the story you tell yourself.

Black Arrow's free Response Audit runs this calculation automatically: your score, leads lost monthly, and the revenue at risk.

#SpeedToLead #ServiceBusiness #LeadFollowUp #ContractorMarketing #HomeServiceMarketing
rationale: Carousels still lead saves/depth for B2B educational content in 2026, and this reframes the account's core speed-to-lead fact around a fresh, precisely-sourced 2026 study, teaching median-vs-best-case measurement instead of restating the familiar 17%/double-close-rate line.
